> ⚠️ **For sensitive vulnerabilities, please email security@americangroupllc.com BEFORE filing
> a public issue.** Do NOT post exploit details, leaked keys, or PII in this template.

## Summary
High-level description (no exploit code).

## Affected component
- [ ] Android app (`android/app`)
- [ ] Android core (`android/core`)
- [ ] Native llama.cpp JNI bridge (`vendor/llama.cpp` + JNI glue)
- [ ] Desktop module (`desktop/`)
- [ ] Keyboard / IME
- [ ] Build / CI / signing
- [ ] Other

## Impact
What can an attacker do? (RCE / data exfil / model substitution / IME-snooping / etc.)

## Reproduction (private)
Will be shared on request via secure channel.

## Suggested mitigation
